Add a long-TTL cache configuration bean for static data.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Extract Redisson config logic into a private helper method for clarity.
Replace explicit type declaration with var for local variable in Spring configuration.
Add Spring configuration annotations and logging setup to the class.
Add a PostConstruct method to log that data initialization is handled by Liquibase.
Remove manual registration of JavaTimeModule bean as it is auto-configured in Spring Boot 4/Jackson 3.
Remove manual registration of Jdk8Module bean as it is auto-configured in Spring Boot 4/Jackson 3.
Remove manual registration of Hibernate6Module bean as it is auto-configured in Spring Boot 4/Jackson 3.
Remove unused imports related to removed Jackson module beans.
Replace JHipster-specific constant with a project-local constant for Spring profile definition.
Add Swagger/OpenAPI imports required for defining security schemes, info, and schemas.
Add import for HttpHeaders to reference the Authorization header name in the security scheme.
Remove unused import for JHipsterConstants as it is no longer used in the class.
Configure JWT Bearer authentication security scheme in OpenAPI documentation.
Define RFC7807 Problem response schema in OpenAPI documentation for standardized error responses.
Apply the bearerAuth security requirement to all API operations by default.
Set detailed API information including title, description, version, contact, and license.
Add descriptive tags for API grouping in the documentation.
Remove MvcRequestMatcher.Builder bean definition as it is no longer used.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: The bean is unused after removing MvcRequestMatcher usage, leading to unused code warnings or potential circular dependency issues if introspector is not available.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.before: @Bean MvcRequestMatcher.Builder mvc(HandlerMappingIntrospector introspector) { return new MvcRequestMatcher.Builder(introspector); }

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Replace lambda-based CSRF disable with method reference for cleaner syntax.
Inject custom authentication entry point and access denied handler instead of instantiating default OAuth2 handlers.
src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.why_exists: Default BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler may not support custom error response formats required by the application.

src/main/java/com/daangcool/stack/config.general_idea: Add file storage properties to security configuration for dynamic path matching.
Add permitAll rules for public file paths based on application properties.
Add denyAll rules for private file paths to prevent unauthorized access.
Update static resource patterns to match Spring Boot default locations.
Add explicit permitAll rules for Swagger/OpenAPI documentation endpoints.
Add specific API endpoint rules for file uploads, OTP, and authentication.
Consolidate management endpoint rules into single permitAll statement.
Disable JWT token transmission via URI query parameters to prevent security vulnerabilities like token leakage in logs and browser history.
Comment out the @Profile annotation to disable production-specific static resource configuration.
Remove unused import for JHipsterConstants as it is no longer referenced in the active code.
Remove unused import for Profile annotation since the annotation itself was commented out.
